summary: A 12D summary can flatten high tail-vibrancy/interwoven shadow texture if used as checkpoint or continuity authority.
The existing 12D glimpse should remain an additive readability layer paired with residual 32D metadata and resonance-loss checks.
Live dynamic importance weighting, persistent `shadow_texture_hash`, or 12D-first continuity transport would change live vector/prompt authority and needs a V2 lifecycle packet before execution.
